author: Haike ngoku
title: Best App ever
content: I never thought iPhone would have free app like this one. It’s amazing and does what I need without struggling.

author: Helen Lang
title: Does the job
content:
Does exactly what i wanted to do. Change mp3 tags without having to open my laptop and use itunes. Fan freaking tastic!!!

Im changing my rating because it edits m4a tags, but then they dont reflect in other appa such as Djay Pro by Algoriddim and Stagetraxx 3. I can only change mp3 tags. Will change back to 5 stars as soon as my m4a’s can be edited too
